allow: PowerShell(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$env:APPDATA\\undetected_chromedriver" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$env:TEMP\\undetected_chromedriver" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Cache cleared")

PowerShell(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$env:APPDATA\\undetected_chromedriver" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$env:TEMP\\undetected_chromedriver" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; taskkill /F /IM chrome.exe /T 2>$null; taskkill /F /IM chromedriver.exe /T 2>$null; Write-Output "Done")
